title: Function, Issues of Concern, Health Care Provider as Well as Team Role, Tissue as Well as Organ Selection Along With Processing, Non-Living Donors, Living Donors and Clinical Significance Regarding Tissue and Organ Donation
author: Mahaparea APK
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Donating tissue or organs is a multifaceted and intricate process that begins with the careful process of determining death. Following this, a specific set of inclusion/exclusion criteria determines whether or not organs may be obtained from the donor. Ultimately, this leads to a multispecialty transplant and procurement procedure. This exercise clarifies how the donation procedure is assessed and managed and emphasises the part the medical staff plays in post-transplant patient care.
steps_raw: Donating tissue or organs is a multifaceted and intricate process that begins with the careful process of determining death. Ultimately, this leads to a multispecialty transplant and procurement procedure. This exercise clarifies how the donation procedure is assessed and managed and emphasises the part the medical staff plays in post-transplant patient care.
keywords: Hemodynamic support, ventilator support, oegan immunogenicity, circulatory function, respiratory function,  viability of organs as well as tissues, hepatectomy, pancreactectomy and nephrectomy
